---
title: "Cityscapes"
---

![](/images/IMG_4115.jpg)

The Painted Ladies/Downtown, San Francisco, CA

![](/images/IMG_1456.jpg)

Lake Merritt, Oakland, CA

![](images/IMG_4248.jpg)

Washington State Capitol Building, Olympia, WA

![](images/IMG_8849-3.jpg)

Kyoto, Japan

![](images/IMG_6152.jpg)

Naturhistorisches Museum, Vienna, Austria
